feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,924Chapters: 18/75Kudos: 28

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: Surrounded by darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,838Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 22

Summary: I would like to point out that English is not my native language.After the fight with Donovan, Stiles falls with him and loses his sight. Scott and the pack turn their backs on him, believing Theo's lies. Theo actually wants nothing more than to push them away so he can have the boy all to himself. Stiles is depressed and doesn't know what to do with his life. All his dreams have vanished, and now he must accept his new condition. Will anyone help him?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: you just can't stop leaving, can you?
entry.summary:
Author: lonelyBoneflower

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,921Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 6

Summary: He was a stranger. Just some sullen guy we ran into in the woods while looking for the inhaler my best friend relied on as if it were his very lifeline. And then, one day, we stood side by side, as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Derek was a stranger, yet when he stood with us, it felt entirely natural. Perhaps, from the very beginning, my heart had recognized him as a man worthy of trust—even if my mind was much slower to catch up to that truth. After the events of the movie, Stiles returns to town. [Alternate story for Teen Wolf The Movie]

entry.title: Territorial
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,797Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 114

Summary: And now Derek looked suspicious. Which was just—rude. So rude. Stiles was the very picture of innocence! How could he possibly think Stiles was up to something?!“Like what?” Derek asked.“Well,” Stiles said, dragging the word out while stretching his arms forward on the table until he could close his hands around both of Derek’s. “My friend Mieka and I have been bonding over the past few months, and she just got a puppy, and she thought it might be fun for the two of us to bring our dogs to the dog park right outside town.”Derek stared at him exceptionally hard. “You don’t have a dog.”“I—why are you and dad the same?” Stiles let Derek’s hands go to throw both arms in the air. “Yes, Derek, I am aware I don’t have a dog!”“So what exactly is this conversation leading to?” Derek asked, crossing his arms over his chest and looking thoroughly unimpressed.Stiles licked his lips before pressing them together, trying to think of the best way to word this before blurting out, “In my defence, it was entirely dad’s idea! I wanted to steal a dog from the clinic!”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Ghost of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: pixieblade

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,881Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Mieczysław Stilinski stepped out of the transport ship with the air of someone who had seen everything and could have cared less about most of it. He was here to observe. To learn how the rest of the Galactic Syndicate Members trained their soldiers, advisors, and researchers. His father had been specific in his instructions: keep your eyes and ears open and your mouth shut. Keep the darkness contained and no matter what, never let them know what you are.

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,705Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,640Chapters: 28/45Kudos: 55

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: [Podfic] Aquamarine by Hedwig221b
entry.summary:
Author: Squishyowlbear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: The nymph was the best prey Derek had ever had — evading him at every turn, yet teasing within reach. Here, in the middle of the lake, between crumbling ruins of the naiad’s temple, with Stiles pressed against him, Derek could taste the life again. He was as close to peace as it got. If only he could satisfy the heat in his lower parts, to turn his head and seal his lips against Stiles’ smile, to sink into him and make love, long and sweet, all night ‘till morning… If he could wake each day to Stiles lying next to him, maybe, then his soul would settle. But now, even while breathing the same air, Derek did not have him at all. Still, he kept coming. Fixing things, bringing things, pulling Stiles close until he stopped resisting. All creatures yearned for warmth, and Stiles, with his transparent clothes clinging to his slender, wet body was not an exception.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fifty Bucks to Die
entry.summary:
Author: redandblue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,871Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 58

Summary: To destroy a deadly drug cartel, agent Derek Hale goes undercover as a desperate junkie. But when college kid Stiles stumbles into a deal, Derek must maintain the dangerous act to save the boy's life. Warning: Contains depictions of drug use! Sterek AU

entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,523Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 75

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Dying In Love
entry.summary:
Author: amatorial

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,909Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 105

Summary: After dropping out of his FBI internship, Stiles returned to Beacon Hills, struggling to outgrow the version of himself high school forced him to become. He wasn't sure what he was doing with his life, but he kept busy among the shelves at The Reading Nook, letting the quiet and routine distract him from the memories. And then Derek Hale walked in. Derek being in his life again stirred a hunger inside Stiles, a wanting that consumed him whole. It left him breathless, filled with a love so fierce it clawed at his chest and threatened to tear him apart inside.

entry.title: ᴀ ꜰʟᴏᴡᴇʀ ᴍᴀᴅᴇ ᴏꜰ ɪʀᴏɴ 🌷
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,157,247Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers. ⚠️ NOTICE: New update coming July 1st!

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Closet
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,668Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 260

Summary: “Dude, come on! We’re late! Everyone’s already there and the trailers are gonna start soon!”Did his car break down or something? Was he expecting a ride from him?“That’s not my problem.”“Uh, kind of is!” Stiles argued. “We’re gonna miss the beginning of the movie, and won’t know what’s going on. Hurry up, let’s go!” He motioned him down yet again, and Derek scowled.“Why do you keep saying ‘we’ as if I have any intention of going anywhere with you?”“Because you are coming to this movie, or I will stay out here all night screaming.”

entry.title: Only When It's You
entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,665Chapters: 10/39Kudos: 76

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.
